item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Systems Market Is Booming Worldwide | Cognex Corporation • Omron Corporation - openPR.com
item.description: The automated optical inspection systems market is experiencing significant global growth, driven by key players like Cognex and Omron.

item.title: Scalable, PC-Free AI Inspection with Cognex In-Sight 3900
item.description: Cognex introduces a new In-Sight 3900 system enabling scalable, high-resolution AI-based inspections for manufacturing.

item.title: Advanced chipmaking drives Taiwan inspection firms toward listings - Taiwan News
item.description: Taiwanese inspection firms are moving towards public listings driven by the demands of advanced chipmaking processes.

item.title: GelSight Modulus Tops 100 Units in Expanding Metrology Applications
item.description: GelSight has announced that its high-resolution tactile sensing technology, GelSight Modulus, has surpassed 100 units sold.

item.title: Zebra Technologies Makes Strategic Investment in Apera AI to Drive Intelligent Automation
item.description: Zebra Technologies has made a strategic investment in Apera AI to advance intelligent automation and 4D vision for industrial robots.

item.title: Manufacturers Must Unify Data Now to Meet First Digital Product Passport Deadlines | Quality Magazine
item.description: Manufacturers must unify their data to meet the first digital product passport deadlines.

item.title: Advanced Vision System Enhances Quality Control and Precision at RB Industrial Manufacturing – Metrology and Quality News - Online Magazine
item.description: System will support first article inspection, in-process quality checks, and final inspection and verification of finished parts.
